The program captures breaking business news as it unfolds and tracks pre market equity moves, commodity swings, U.S. futures, and overnight action across global markets.

programme.title: US Squawk Box
programme.desc: “Squawk Box” is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

programme.title: Money Movers
programme.desc: “Money Movers” provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. programme.title: Oumuamua - Mysterious Messenger From Another Star
programme.desc: Where does Oumuamua, the mysterious interstellar flying object discovered in 2017, come from? Astronomer Robert Weryk spotted it with the help of the Pan-STARRS telescope in Hawaii. But what is Oumuamua? A comet? An artificial object?

programme.title: A Woman In The Well Of Death: India's Bravest Stunt Driver
programme.desc: Rehana Khan is one of India's few female stunt drivers. She tours the country's fairgrounds, drawing crowds as she rips around the 'Well of Death” on her motorcycle - a massive wooden structure with vertical walls. This danger is only compounded by the difficulty in making ends meet for her family as India's travelling fairs struggle to compete with modern entertainment.

programme.title: Electric Mobility: From Ethiopia To The Premium Ev Market
programme.desc: Addis Ababa is expanding electric buses and taxis to cut costs and modernize transport, but the transition faces structural challenges. Plus: we review the DS N°8 and its place among high-end electric cars.

programme.title: Légendes urbaines
programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. Ils sont les têtes d'affiches des genres musicaux les plus écoutés aujourd'hui mais sont parfois méconnus du grand public. Une découverte de la face cachée' de ces artistes, derrière les clichés, les postures, et loin de l'actualité promotionnelle.'

programme.title: Le club Paris direct[Live]
programme.desc: Des experts issus de la géopolitique, des sciences de l'environnement, des sciences sociales et de la culture se réunissent pour analyser et débattre des sujets majeurs qui dominent l'actualité. programme.title: Autour du monde : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Les informations qui font la une aux quatre coins du monde sont décryptées à travers des reportages, des analyses approfondies et le travail de correspondants internationaux. Un regard global et complet sur l'actualité pour mieux comprendre les événements qui façonnent notre époque.

programme.title: Légendes urbaines
programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. Ils sont les têtes d'affiches des genres musicaux les plus écoutés aujourd'hui mais sont parfois méconnus du grand public. Une découverte de la face cachée' de ces artistes, derrière les clichés, les postures, et loin de l'actualité promotionnelle.'

programme.title: E20 - Nexus
programme.desc: As NCIS investigates a dangerous connection between the Nexus cartel and Parker's longtime nemesis, mob boss Carla Marino, the team uncovers a high-stakes plot involving stolen nuclear material. With time running out, Parker is forced into an uneasy alliance that could determine the fate of the operation - and his own future.

programme.title: E12 - Bingo, Bango, Bento!
programme.desc: The seven remaining chefs work individually to create Japanese-inspired dishes for their bento boxes; one judge oversees the chefs during the elimination challenge, while two judges blindly taste test their creations.

programme.title: E13 - Picture Perfect
programme.desc: The six remaining chefs are tasked with recreating a picture perfect dish using just the memory of a reference photo.

programme.title: E1 - No Country Is Safe
programme.desc: Their family now in danger, Tony and Ziva must find who is behind a nefarious cyber-attack.

programme.title: E4 - Tough Divisions
programme.desc: A group of young, entitled guests continue to cause chaos for the crew. The chef pulls together an over-the-top eight-course tasting menu that totally rocks and when the primary demands a late-night swim, it lands him and the crew in murky waters. Two deckhands have become a liability and Capt. Sandy and Nathan must figure out what to do about it.

programme.title: E7 - Le Vie En Bros
programme.desc: A new crew member joins and whips the boat into shape. A bachelor charters the yacht along with his matchmaker in the hopes of finding love while at sea. A newly single crew member sends romantic possibilities spinning. The Chief Stew gives a sharp warning about a love triangle on board.

programme.title: E8 - French Kiss
programme.desc: The deck team comes under fire for being too lax on the job. The Primary gets in hot water with the women he's dating. A promotion on the interior leaves a stew feeling envious. An unexpected hook-up sends shockwaves through the crew.

E10 - 爆閃一家人 爆笑過大年
programme.desc: 重磅打造的全明星爆笑旅行遊戲真人秀，由黃曉明、黃子韜、劉耀文、邵子恆、王鶴棣、于洋組成「宇宙爆閃團」，用高能抽象任務，打造解壓式快樂體驗，去有趣的地方做有意義的事；放下偶像包袱，發送獨一無二的快樂訊號。

programme.title: E17 - 談過戀愛卻還是愛情新手
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.desc: 每集由一位原唱歌手對抗三位金曲守護人，以自己的非主打歌與主打歌同台PK，通過現場500位大眾聽審的投票決定挑戰是否成功。原唱歌手包括任賢齊、鄭少秋、吳克群、周筆暢、鄧紫棋、李克勤、趙傳、蔡健雅、許美靜、許茹芸等。

programme.title: E1 - Baby Sea Otter Finds a Family
programme.desc: Join the vet and his team in saving a massive sea lion caught in a plastic noose, and then visit the Rescue Center, where a harbor seal pup may lose its eyesight and a baby sea otter needs a risky but life-saving surgery.

programme.title: E1 - Baby Sea Otter Finds a Family
programme.desc: Join the vet and his team in saving a massive sea lion caught in a plastic noose, and then visit the Rescue Center, where a harbor seal pup may lose its eyesight and a baby sea otter needs a risky but life-saving surgery.

programme.title: E1 - Realm of the Bear
programme.desc: Join a mother brown bear as she struggles to find food for her two young cubs while teaching them essential skills for the harsh winter ahead. Then visit a pair of tiny lynx kittens as they begin to venture away from the safety of their den.

programme.title: E2 - Realm of the Wolf
programme.desc: In the remote wilderness of the Carpathian Mountains lives an elusive predator that has inspired awe and fear throughout history: the Eurasian wolf. Discover the vital role that these once-misunderstood hunters play in protecting their ecosystem.

programme.title: E1 - The Clean Up Crew
programme.desc: Winter in Marakele National Park is one of the scarcest, but also most plentiful, times of the year. See how a giraffe’s demise becomes a source of life for the region’s vultures, whose survival depends on the decaying flesh of animals like these.

programme.desc: Join the vet and his team in saving a massive sea lion caught in a plastic noose, and then visit the Rescue Center, where a harbor seal pup may lose its eyesight and a baby sea otter needs a risky but life-saving surgery.

programme.title: E1 - Realm of the Bear
programme.desc: Join a mother brown bear as she struggles to find food for her two young cubs while teaching them essential skills for the harsh winter ahead. Then visit a pair of tiny lynx kittens as they begin to venture away from the safety of their den.

programme.title: E2 - Realm of the Wolf
programme.desc: In the remote wilderness of the Carpathian Mountains lives an elusive predator that has inspired awe and fear throughout history: the Eurasian wolf. Discover the vital role that these once-misunderstood hunters play in protecting their ecosystem.

programme.title: E28
programme.desc: Hiiragi Kanade (Fukuchi Momoko) arrives in Noto as a volunteer and unexpectedly ends up launching a community radio station with the local residents. But there's no experience, no budget, and no studio - only a shared desire to bring light back to a town hurt by earthquakes and torrential rain. Once the broadcast begins, there's no turning back. A nonstop entertainment drama where ordinary citizens find themselves becoming stars.

programme.title: E98
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan's first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

E104
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E6 - Is Butchery A Disappearing Profession?
programme.desc: There is a shortage of new butchers. Nearly 10,000 butcher positions are unfilled across Canada. Why? Also covered: potassium, essential for health; food waste at festivals; rockfish (sebaste), now sold in stores.

programme.title: E83 - L'eclaireur, The Eye Of The Hunter
programme.desc: Fashion, craftwork, design, beauty, cuisine, lifestyle... a round-up of the best moments from ''Tendance XXI''!

programme.title: E19 - Special Haute Couture Shows Autumn/Winter 2023-2024
programme.desc: The best of the season with Dior, Charles de Vilmorin, Schiaparelli, Iris Van Herpen, Chanel, Stephane Rolland, Julien Fournier, and Jean Paul Gaultier. Four designers stand out: Mohammed Ashi, Sara Chraibi, Rahul Mishra, and Adeline Andre. Male fashion with Pharrell Williams for Louis Vuitton, Kim Jones for Dior and EgonLab.

programme.title: E8 - Poached Haddock In Coconut Milk And Crunchy Salad
programme.desc: To entertain simply and stylishly, the chef offers a menu featuring haddock poached in coconut milk and a crunchy salad.

programme.title: E20 - Life In A Palace
programme.desc: Gerald Watelet is at the Astoria in Brussels. The mythical palace of the capital has been given a new lease of life after seventeen years of closure. Also: the singer Santa and Brussels, a love story; the furnishing fabrics and wallpapers of Claire de Quenetain; Lotte Kopecky, Velo d'or 2024.

programme.title: E104
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. programme.title: E16 - Finding Your Way In Dog Food
programme.desc: Raw, frozen, grain-free, freeze-dried, vegetarian, carnivorous or even insect-based... canine food is evolving, far from traditional kibble. Also featured: a taste test of cream cheeses; delicious monastic confectionery from Portugal.

programme.title: E3 - Baulmes For The Soul
programme.desc: Mireille Keita builds bridges between the country that offered her a home, Switzerland, and her native Africa. She is the organiser of the Yelen Africa Festival in Baulmes, showcasing the advantages of cultural mixity. The profits are then used to improve people's lives in several villages in Mali.

programme.title: E115
programme.desc: Roshni stands firmly with her husband Raj as he chases his IAS dream. But when his betrayal breaks her trust, her life changes forever. Will she rebuild herself and fight back stronger than ever?

programme.title: E4 - A Magical Sky Adventure!
programme.desc: Go on a magical sky adventure with Twinkle! First, discover the variety of cloud shapes & sizes, from triangles & squares to star-shaped clouds! Then, daydream high in the clouds with Twinkle & Mr. Moon, where her magical stardust makes the moon sneeze & keeps changing colors! The sky-high fun continues as Twinkle soars through the sky on a magical journey to explore all the vibrant colors of the rainbow.

programme.title: E3 - Gentle Lessons & Bedtime
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some gentle lessons & soothing bedtime songs. First, Twinkle learns about the importance of eating healthy, delicious fruit, like bananas, oranges & grapes. Then, help her find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make! After a long day of learning, it's time to get ready for bed. Listen as Twinkle & Mr. Moon sing a soothing nighttime lullaby to help you relax & drift off to sleep.

programme.title: E4 - Sun, Moon, Stars
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E5 - Baby Star
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E1 - Twinkle's Most Magical Moments!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle the star for her most magical moments! When Max, Muffin & Bao Bao build a toy train, Twinkle transforms into a real train & takes the kids on a ride all around the house! Then, when Max pretends he's a wizard, Twinkle turns into a magic wand to make his magic real! Her powers continue as she brings fruits & veggies to life for a puppet show & turns into a giant wibbly-wobbly jelly for everyone to play on! It's always magical with Twinkle!

programme.title: E7 - JJ's Big Animal Adventure!
programme.desc: Go on a big animal adventure with JJ! The fun starts on Grandpa's farm, where JJ learns all about the animals & the sounds they make. He even helps give a sheep a bath! Then, it's time to head to the ocean. Join JJ & his family as they visit an aquarium & sing 'Baby Shark' with a real shark family! The adventure gets prehistoric when Ms. Appleberry teaches the class all about their favorite dinosaurs. From guessing games to meeting Bingo the dog, it's a wild day!

programme.title: E1 - Our Favorite Family Adventures!
programme.desc: Join Buster on his favorite family adventures! When Mummy has to dash off to work, Buster & Grandpa have to make dinner together. They follow a recipe & it creates a big mess, but it's still tasty! The adventures continue as Buster & Daddy spend the day together, playing soccer & chasing a runaway kite! Plus, the whole family goes on an outdoor camping trip where a runaway tent causes chaos through the campsite.

programme.title: E9 - JJ's Favorite Songs & Stories!
programme.desc: It's story time with JJ's favorite songs & stories! First, sing along to 'Wheels on the Bus' as JJ & his friends put on an interactive show. Then, settle in for some classic tales. Watch as the three little pigs try to build houses strong enough to keep the Big Bad Wolf away. Then, find out who wins a big race: the speedy hare or the slow & steady tortoise! Finally, learn a lesson about working hard with the story of the Grasshopper & the Ants.

programme.title: E7 - JJ's Big Animal Adventure!
programme.desc: Go on a big animal adventure with JJ! The fun starts on Grandpa's farm, where JJ learns all about the animals & the sounds they make. He even helps give a sheep a bath! Then, it's time to head to the ocean. Join JJ & his family as they visit an aquarium & sing 'Baby Shark' with a real shark family! The adventure gets prehistoric when Ms. Appleberry teaches the class all about their favorite dinosaurs. From guessing games to meeting Bingo the dog, it's a wild day!

programme.title: E1 - The Wacky World of Winston & Orphle!
programme.desc: Welcome to the wacky world of Winston & Orphle! First, Winston tricks a Magic Pet into growing his robots of Mila & Morphle big enough to steal the entire Magic Pet Center! Then, Orphle causes trouble on his own when he runs away with the cake Mila made for her & Morphle's Matchiversary. The two troublemakers team up to try & get their hands on a special surprise gift, but it's up to Mila & Morphle to stop them!

programme.title: E1 - Our Favorite Family Adventures!
programme.desc: Join Buster on his favorite family adventures! When Mummy has to dash off to work, Buster & Grandpa have to make dinner together. They follow a recipe & it creates a big mess, but it's still tasty! The adventures continue as Buster & Daddy spend the day together, playing soccer & chasing a runaway kite! Plus, the whole family goes on an outdoor camping trip where a runaway tent causes chaos through the campsite.

programme.title: E1 - The Wacky World of Winston & Orphle!
programme.desc: Welcome to the wacky world of Winston & Orphle! First, Winston tricks a Magic Pet into growing his robots of Mila & Morphle big enough to steal the entire Magic Pet Center! Then, Orphle causes trouble on his own when he runs away with the cake Mila made for her & Morphle's Matchiversary. The two troublemakers team up to try & get their hands on a special surprise gift, but it's up to Mila & Morphle to stop them!

programme.title: E4 - A Magical Sky Adventure!
programme.desc: Go on a magical sky adventure with Twinkle! First, discover the variety of cloud shapes & sizes, from triangles & squares to star-shaped clouds! Then, daydream high in the clouds with Twinkle & Mr. Moon, where her magical stardust makes the moon sneeze & keeps changing colors! The sky-high fun continues as Twinkle soars through the sky on a magical journey to explore all the vibrant colors of the rainbow.

programme.title: E1 - Twinkle's Most Magical Moments!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle the star for her most magical moments! When Max, Muffin & Bao Bao build a toy train, Twinkle transforms into a real train & takes the kids on a ride all around the house! Her powers continue as she brings fruits & veggies to life for a puppet show & turns into a giant wibbly-wobbly jelly for everyone to play on! It's always magical with Twinkle!

programme.title: E3 - Gentle Lessons & Bedtime
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some gentle lessons & soothing bedtime songs. First, Twinkle learns about the importance of eating healthy, delicious fruit, like bananas, oranges & grapes. Then, help her find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make! After a long day of learning, it's time to get ready for bed. Listen as Twinkle & Mr. Moon sing a soothing nighttime lullaby to help you relax & drift off to sleep.

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: Vasudha E543
programme.desc: Vasudha, a cheerful maid, joins business leader Chandrika's home. Despite differing beliefs, she seeks Chandrika's approval and struggles to fit into her elite world.

programme.title: Saru E364
programme.desc: A kabaddi champion from Rajasthan moves to Mumbai to chase her dreams. Along the way, she reunites with her family and fights hard to earn her mother the respect she truly deserves.

programme.title: Ganga Mai Ki Betiyan E238
programme.desc: Ganga Mai, abandoned for bearing daughters, defies norms with fierce love and dignity, raising three girls who each forge bold, individual paths shaped by their dreams and inner fire.

programme.title: Tumm Se Tumm Tak E308
programme.desc: Anu and Aryavardhan fall in love despite a big age gap. Facing family disapproval and challenges, they fight to show that real love knows no limits or rules.

E2 - Part 2
programme.desc: Though Bonnie Parker and Clyde Barrow's crime spree is legendary, their story has never been told quite like this. Fueled by their passion for each other and Bonnie's obsession with fame, the couple committed increasingly dangerous robberies, leaving a trail of blood - and headlines - behind them. Aided by Clyde's sixth sense, they stayed one step ahead of the law until their final, fateful showdown.

programme.desc: When a woman is murdered during an afternoon shopping trip with her daughter, Benson and Stabler are called in because she was scheduled to testify in their high-profile rape case.

programme.title: E3 - Part 3
programme.desc: Fueled by their passion for each other and Bonnie's obsession with fame, the couple committed increasingly dangerous robberies, leaving a trail of blood - and headlines - behind them. Aided by Clyde's sixth sense, they stayed one step ahead of the law until their final, fateful showdown

programme.title: E14 - The Mother-in-Law of the Year
programme.desc: Endora has her day and her way as-Darrin tries to sell bon bons.

programme.title: E106 - Cherry Bad Things
programme.desc: Cherry visits, and the Thundermans discover she still has her superpowers. Cherry promises to remove them after her girls' day with Phoebe and Chloe, but the powers malfunction and puts the group in danger. Max hosts Jinx, making Colosso jealous.

programme.title: E406 - Sea Haw / Li'l Past-cals
programme.desc: Patrick hosts a countrified variety show. // The Kelpbed Kids travel to the future to get their kicking can back.

programme.title: E116 - Backpay Payback
programme.desc: Granny Tentacles helps Squidward collect his paper delivery money from Cecil.

programme.title: E716 - Dread of the Class / Welcome to the Doll Heist
programme.desc: In order to receive her diploma from Luan's pranking academy, Ronnie Anne must pass one final test. // When Lily accidentally trades Eunice away, she must get her back before Lola gets home.

programme.title: E105 - Mar-Snoop / Canteen Carnage
programme.desc: On her quest to get her own Marsupilami, Bibi encounters a Jaguar which scares her enough to give up the hunt. // Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: E806 - Europe Road Trip: Nonna Your Business
programme.desc: The Louds journey to Naples Italy to taste the world's best pizza, made by a secretive and legendary chef.

programme.title: E208 - Freaky Fri-Day-Day
programme.desc: A face-swap app causes Lay Lay and Sadie to switch bodies, forcing both girls to live a day in the other's shoes before they can resolve the issue.

programme.title: E102 - The Bird Scene
programme.desc: Tori goes all out to master an iconic Hollywood Arts monologue in Sikowitz's class. Meanwhile, André and Robbie join a ballet class to meet girls with disastrous results.

programme.title: E102 - #FavoriteShow
programme.desc: Sam and Cat babysit two boys: one who asks a lot of questions, and another who can't stop hugging. The girls also attempt to save their favorite TV show from being cancelled and Sam finds a special way to keep the show alive.

programme.title: E201 - The Beat Goes On
programme.desc: With the return on Dr. Minyak, Henry finds himself in danger when he realizes that the evil doer has transformed his best friend, Charlotte, into a super strong being set to capture Kid Danger and Captain Man.

programme.title: E424 - A Dark & Story Night / Sand Hassles
programme.desc: When the lights go out in the Loud House, the kids entertain themselves by taking turns telling parts of a story. // Lucy and the Morticians' Club try to thwart plans for a school field trip to the beach.

programme.title: E608 - Sofa, So Good
programme.desc: The kids search all over Royal Woods to find the missing furniture they left outside while cleaning.

programme.title: E505 - The Great Cactus Con
programme.desc: Jasper gets the chance to take his crush to Cactus Con. When a mysterious villain gets involved the entire gang is forced into action!

programme.title: E27
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E30
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 《超時空羅曼史》講述了民國功夫巨星向秦羽，因一場意外來到21世紀，與十八線編劇金阿銀相遇，兩人展開了奇妙浪漫又充滿戲劇性的愛情故事。

programme.title: E9 - Man Vs Machine
programme.desc: There's plenty of malfunctions in these clips of man vs. machine. From power tools to semi-trucks, each moment is a wild adventure caught on camera.

programme.title: E8 - Winter's Fortune: Into The Breach
programme.desc: Tony Beets finally learns the fate of his Indian River claims -- pivotal to his 9,000-ounce season.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Follows the interventions of the Security and Customs Services at the borders of Spain who are under the constant threat from drugs, weapons, and suspected terrorists.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Rod and JC battle extreme weather and steep terrain as they search for sapphires. Then, the duo undertakes a huge fishing expedition: hunting the mythical Tassie Tiger.

programme.title: E1 - Do No Harm
programme.desc: A man is driving home when he sees a woman being dragged down the street against her will.

programme.title: E1 - Do No Harm
programme.desc: A man is driving home when he sees a woman being dragged down the street against her will.

programme.title: Time for Theatre
programme.desc: It was in Ancient Greece that the very first plays were created from songs and dances performed during religious festivals. Howler and Columba bring us tragedy, comedy and poetry through the theatre of life!

programme.title: Frog
programme.desc: Binah and Grandad are fascinated to learn that a group of frogs is called an army and begin to wonder which one might be the general. Flip, Flop, and Flow pretend to be amphibians. And Tiny and Daddy Owl are worried about Mommy, who can't stop coughing.

programme.title: The Friend (Courteney Cox) and the Showman (Channing Tatum)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary presented by Bear Grylls, award-winning actress and producer Courteney Cox, of Friends, recounts how she became a TV star and Channing Tatum reflects on how he went from a struggling student to a recognized Hollywood actor.

programme.title: HIV Vaccine On Trial
programme.desc: A team of French scientists has developed a potential HIV/AIDS vaccine, using a protein of the HIV-virus called 'GP41'. It allows the generation of neutralising antibodies and could in turn help overcome one of the world's most pernicious diseases.

programme.title: Hopes and Dreams
programme.desc: The Icicles have made it to the World Synchro Championships and are heading to Canada. After a season of flawless performances, can the girls pull off their Bollywood routine? The end of season Gala is near, but preparations aren't running as smoothly as everyone hoped.

programme.title: Tunnel
programme.desc: An undersea waterfall hides a mysterious tunnel behind it. As the Nektons explore it, they find not everything is as it should be.

programme.title: The Paper Plane Problem
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts learn about the different shapes of paper planes, and then have to help Heni rescue Burpee from the top of a tree.

programme.title: Why Are Plants So Green?
programme.desc: The chlorophyll in plants takes in energy from sunlight. It absorbs colours like red and blue, but reflects the green wavelengths back to us. This process makes plants look green to our eyes.

programme.title: Vikings
programme.desc: Like Raven and Little Lewis, the famous giants of the northern mists, the Vikings, are master looters and navigators. Besides being bloody warriors and shrewd negotiators, the Vikings are also great explorers, out to discover the world.

programme.title: Trials and Tribulations
programme.desc: Coach Esther brings in a star choreographer to try and get the Icicles in shape. Meanwhile, ice hockey-mad Charlie is joined by his best friend as they compete in a late-night trial.

programme.title: Tipsy Topsy Wobbling Crane
programme.desc: When a raging river moves the bridge, Darwin and Newts must learn about counterweights so they can build a crane to reach out and retrieve it.

programme.title: Crazy Catalysts
programme.desc: What is a catalyst? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of chemical engineering. Have hands-on fun by producing your own cheese, and get to know Ryong Ryoo, who discovered a rock trapping water inside it can serve as catalyst in petrochemicals.

programme.title: Team Doki's Big Adventure
programme.desc: While practicing some circus-style tricks, team Doki gets an idea to put on a real circus show for all their friends of the Worldwide Expedition Club. Doki wants it to be amazing, so they set off to a real circus to find out how to put on the Greatest Show on Earth.

programme.title: Orca Baby
programme.desc: Morgan, the deaf orca, is about to give birth to her very first calf. The stakes are high, and the staff at Loro Parque are holding their collective breath as the scene is set for the greatest natural phenomenon in the zoo's history.

programme.title: Short Circuits
programme.desc: Smorph is finding it hard to finish his painting in the dark and his lamp is not working properly. Perhaps it has a short circuit that needs fixing?

programme.title: Paperclip
programme.desc: Nothing is too boring for Hepi and Briko. Watch them make fun things with paperclips.

programme.title: My Life as a Superhero
programme.desc: Sprinter is doubtful whether he is a good superhero. Fortunately, he has Leo and Bumble to remind him of all the good things he has done since returning to Bhilka.

programme.title: Oil Platform
programme.desc: A visit to an oil platform leads to an accident that Kit and Mr. Battery must set right.

programme.title: Trip to Thailand
programme.desc: Is there a country where even toddlers happily eat the spiciest dishes? Our heroes travel to Thailand to find out. And Alim's penfriend Narawan prepares a spicy meal.

programme.title: A Twister Tale
programme.desc: Could a tornado really pick up a house? To find out, the team calls up Mundi's friend Luke, who's a storm-chaser. When the call ends abruptly, Doki declares a rescue expedition! The team flies to a weather station near Oklahoma City, Oklahoma to make sure Luke is okay.

programme.title: Astounding Astronomy
programme.desc: How do rockets manage to defy gravity? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of astronomy. Have hands-on fun by launching your own rocket, and get to know Edwin Hubble, an astronomer, who proved the universe consists of entire galaxies and is expanding.

programme.title: Ebb's Birthday
programme.desc: Ebb's squeaky ball has lost its squeak. And the next day is Ebb's birthday. Flo has organised a party for Ebb and after, Flo and Bird give Ebb a birthday gift. It's a brand new squeaky ball! Things Couldn't Be Better!

programme.title: Jesters
programme.desc: Lord Roach is feeling really down! His wife Geraldine goes out of her way to entertain him, bringing in acrobats, musicians, etc. But it's no good. Enter Little Lewis, dressed in his court jester costume and Lord Roach is very happy.

programme.title: Vikings
programme.desc: Like Raven and Little Lewis, the famous giants of the northern mists, the Vikings, are master looters and navigators. Besides being bloody warriors and shrewd negotiators, the Vikings are also great explorers, out to discover the world.

programme.title: A Twister Tale
programme.desc: Could a tornado really pick up a house? To find out, the team calls up Mundi's friend Luke, who's a storm-chaser. When the call ends abruptly, Doki declares a rescue expedition! The team flies to a weather station near Oklahoma City, Oklahoma to make sure Luke is okay.

programme.title: Oil Platform
programme.desc: A visit to an oil platform leads to an accident that Kit and Mr. Battery must set right.

programme.title: The Leech's Spaghetti Dinner
programme.desc: The giant Bornean leech can grow up to half a metre long. It finds earthworms to eat by following the smell of their slimy trail. Because the leech has no teeth, it slurps the worms like spaghetti.

programme.title: Disappearing Ducks
programme.desc: When Heni organises her charity duckling river race, Darwin and Newts discover an underwater stream.

programme.title: Violet's Diary
programme.desc: Violet loses her top secret diary - which wouldn't be a problem if she hadn't written the Emergency Destruct Code for Team Alien headquarters inside it - and if Teresa hadn't discovered that it was missing.

programme.title: Colour Detection
programme.desc: Discover how computers can recognise colours through their sensors using an 'eye' that does not see but guesses colour.

programme.title: Viola Brand: World Famous Artistic Cyclist
programme.desc: Viola Brand is an artistic cyclist from Germany who has won national and European championships with her gymnastic abilities on a bicycle. She holds the GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS title for the most 360-degree rotations, standing on bicycle handlebars in one minute.

programme.title: The Leech's Spaghetti Dinner
programme.desc: The giant Bornean leech can grow up to half a metre long. It finds earthworms to eat by following the smell of their slimy trail. Because the leech has no teeth, it slurps the worms like spaghetti.

programme.title: Tipsy Topsy Wobbling Crane
programme.desc: When a raging river moves the bridge, Darwin and Newts must learn about counterweights so they can build a crane to reach out and retrieve it.

programme.title: Orca Baby
programme.desc: Morgan, the deaf orca, is about to give birth to her very first calf. The stakes are high, and the staff at Loro Parque are holding their collective breath as the scene is set for the greatest natural phenomenon in the zoo's history.

programme.title: Trip to Thailand
programme.desc: Is there a country where even toddlers happily eat the spiciest dishes? Our heroes travel to Thailand to find out. And Alim's penfriend Narawan prepares a spicy meal.

programme.title: Disappearing Ducks
programme.desc: When Heni organises her charity duckling river race, Darwin and Newts discover an underwater stream.

programme.title: Astounding Astronomy
programme.desc: How do rockets manage to defy gravity? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of astronomy. Have hands-on fun by launching your own rocket, and get to know Edwin Hubble, an astronomer, who proved the universe consists of entire galaxies and is expanding.

programme.title: Short Circuits
programme.desc: Smorph is finding it hard to finish his painting in the dark and his lamp is not working properly. Perhaps it has a short circuit that needs fixing?

programme.title: Paperclip
programme.desc: Nothing is too boring for Hepi and Briko. Watch them make fun things with paperclips.

programme.title: Crazy Catalysts
programme.desc: What is a catalyst? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of chemical engineering. Have hands-on fun by producing your own cheese, and get to know Ryong Ryoo, who discovered a rock trapping water inside it can serve as catalyst in petrochemicals.

programme.desc: Smorph is finding it hard to finish his painting in the dark and his lamp is not working properly. Perhaps it has a short circuit that needs fixing?

programme.title: Tunnel
programme.desc: An undersea waterfall hides a mysterious tunnel behind it. As the Nektons explore it, they find not everything is as it should be.

programme.title: Orca Baby
programme.desc: Morgan, the deaf orca, is about to give birth to her very first calf. The stakes are high, and the staff at Loro Parque are holding their collective breath as the scene is set for the greatest natural phenomenon in the zoo's history.

programme.title: Trip to Thailand
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo are playing ping-pong when Alim arrives and they offer him a pink racket. But is pink for girls only? Alim takes them to Thailand, where they meet a boy in a pink shirt and learn that in Thailand, colors of clothing match the days of the week, not gender!

programme.title: E3 - Manila
programme.desc: Getting around this city is like navigating a bee hive...except the bees are driving cars, trucks and trikes!

programme.title: E1 - David Attenborough: A Life on Earth
programme.desc: The incredible journey and illustrious career of one of the most travelled men in history, this documentary tells the story of how Sir David Attenborough came to be the voice of modern natural history programs by bringing the natural world into our homes.

programme.title: E1 - Sarah Gets Good News
programme.desc: After the success of her first restaurant in Goa, India, former Masterchef contestant Sarah Todd steps up to the challenge of opening a second restaurant, The Wine Rack in the heart of the urban metropolis, Mumbai.

programme.title: E2 - Kitchen Isn't Ready
programme.desc: Seeking inspiration for her menu, Sarah immerses herself in Mumbai’s thriving street food scene. Meanwhile delays on the new restaurant kitchen are putting the team behind schedule.

programme.title: E3 - Bolivia
programme.desc: In the South American country of Bolivia, Catfish and Rooftop put their bravery to the test. This duo goes 0 for 2 in the ring testing out their fight skills participating in traditional Tinku fighting and getting smacked down by Bolivia’s Fighting Cholitas. They also face a sketchy ride up death rode just to mountain bike down an equally dangerous path. Catfish has yet to keep a meal down as our bikers try llama brains and Rooftop nearly gets run over as a dancing zebra in the streets. The two top their Bolivian trip off with a trip to the mines on the hunt for silver. With some of the most dangerous activities yet, will Rooftop and Catfish be able to leave Bolivia with just a few bumps and bruises from along the way?

programme.title: Beyond's Diary
programme.desc: This is the story of four aspiring young men striving to fight for their own goals. Kui and his family are intent upon emigrating to another country and they put all their energy in making as much money as possible in order to leave Hong Kong sooner. However just as their goal is about in sight, over-exertion causes Kui to fall ill...Keung is a smart and aggressive young man whose ambition is to make it in the world. But misfortune descends upon him when discovering that he and his family are duped by his boss...It has been a childhood dream of Chung to join the police force but his fragile frame of a body is far from satisfactory, so he turns to conducting traffic and handing out tickets to unfortunate drivers amid the bustles of the streets. However, his virtue is not appreciated...Wing is a diligent and self-absorbed student. His goal is to be one of the chosen few at his college's Music Department but he is dissuaded by his girlfriend's father. In the end he gives in and

programme.title: A Moment Of Romance
programme.desc: Wah Dee handles cars and bikes like a racing champion. To keep the police off his trail, he takes Jo Jo hostage. On the run, their desperate love is doomed from the start....

programme.title: The Adventurers
programme.desc: 20 years ago, in the region of Golden Triangle, Wah(aged about 9) and his parents, his god father (Keung) with his daughter (aged about 5) planned to smuggle some valuable items and information into Thailand. Wah's father, Keung and Leung were the closest of friends, just like blood brothers, all 3 of them were C.I.A. agents. Keung left for Thailand before the others to plan the operation. Leung ganged up with some bandits and forced Wah's father to surrender the confidential information. Wah, hidden in the dark, saw his parents being killed. 20 years later, Wah became an officer in the Thai Air Force. He couldn't take his mind off the revenge. Leung became a successful business man. He was in Thailand to launch a major business project. Ignoring Keung's advise, Wah and Roy slipped into Leung's hotel to try to assassinate him...

programme.title: Ebola Syndrome
programme.desc: Ten years ago, Kai, a local gangster was caught in bed with his boss's wife, he killed both the boss and his wife. The boss's daughter Lily witnessed the murders and managed to escape afterwards. As the police were looking for him, Kai was forced to disappear... For the last ten years, Kai has worked in a Chinese restaurant in Johannesburg in South Africa after being smuggled into the country. The restaurant owner Brother Kei and his wife Ling take advantage of Kai's situation and treat him badly. One day Kai goes to buy meat from a native tribe, he is unaware of that a terrible epidemic – the Ebola virus has broken out among the tribesmen. During the trip Kai rapes and murders a black girl who is infected with the disease. Kai has no idea he is carrying the disease, his body creates an antibody which means he is a carrier but the disease won't affect him...

However just as their goal is about in sight, over-exertion causes Kui to fall ill...Keung is a smart and aggressive young man whose ambition is to make it in the world. But misfortune descends upon him when discovering that he and his family are duped by his boss...It has been a childhood dream of Chung to join the police force but his fragile frame of a body is far from satisfactory, so he turns to conducting traffic and handing out tickets to unfortunate drivers amid the bustles of the streets. However, his virtue is not appreciated...Wing is a diligent and self-absorbed student. His goal is to be one of the chosen few at his college's Music Department but he is dissuaded by his girlfriend's father. In the end he gives in and

programme.title: The Movie Star Says -Kwan Kam Pang
programme.desc: “Rogue”, one of the most significant film of Director Stanley Kwan, earned him the Best Director and made the characters “Fleur” and “Chan Chen-Pang” a legend. He reveals the story behind the film's directorial position and the obstacles he encountered along the production, as well as talking about his delicate sense of portraying women's stories.

programme.title: The Adventurers
programme.desc: 20 years ago, in the region of Golden Triangle, Wah(aged about 9) and his parents, his god father (Keung) with his daughter (aged about 5) planned to smuggle some valuable items and information into Thailand. Wah's father, Keung and Leung were the closest of friends, just like blood brothers, all 3 of them were C.I.A. agents. Keung left for Thailand before the others to plan the operation. Leung ganged up with some bandits and forced Wah's father to surrender the confidential information. Wah, hidden in the dark, saw his parents being killed. 20 years later, Wah became an officer in the Thai Air Force. He couldn't take his mind off the revenge. Leung became a successful business man. He was in Thailand to launch a major business project. Ignoring Keung's advise, Wah and Roy slipped into Leung's hotel to try to assassinate him...

programme.title: Monster Wore Jeans
programme.desc: Tsu, a police officer, has a happy life with his wife, who's pregnant. But one day when he gets a tip that a bank is about to be robbed, he rushes to it but killed. The hostage Gucci then holds the loot. Tsu becomes a vampire when a cat jumps on his body and is hit by lightning. Not until he went to the hospital did he realize he was dead and needs electric recharge to be alive. In order to keep his wife from being sad, he doesn't tell her the truth. Even when his best friend Mr. Big and Gucci find it out, he asks them to keep in secret. To get back the loot, the robbers seize both Gucci and Tsu's wife, forcing Tsu to bring the loot to exchange them...

programme.title: Hocus Pocus
programme.desc: In a touring opera group, the domineering star is hated by all. The lesser actors try to give him a bad time by posing as ghosts. Their antics attract the attention of a real ghost who comes to make fun of them. Stage old hand Seng soon discovers the mischievous ghost met a violent death. Seng promises to find his remains and bury him. Unwittingly, Seng buries the wrong bones which belong to the Vicious Ghost. The Vicious Ghost comes and leaves a trail of violence...

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: Linlang
programme.desc: Victor Lualhati, a former boxer turned seaman, discovers signs of his wife Juliana's infidelity and begins a personal investigation. As he digs deeper, Victor uncovers a web of deception involving powerful figures and family secrets, realizing that the affair is only part of a much larger and more dangerous conspiracy.

programme.title: Beyond The Headlines: Black Girl Missing
programme.desc: Companion piece to the movie Black Girl Missing. While the media goes into a frenzy over missing white girls, Black women's disappearances receive muted coverage and limited police resources.

programme.desc: When a Georgia college student disappears, police open an investigation into a possible hate crime and abduction. However, Dr. Jamie Downs uncovers evidence that spins the case in a new direction.

programme.title: E128 - Marv Attacks/A Wolf In Cheap Clothing/High Speed Hare/Beaky Buzzard Gags: Rattle Snak
programme.desc: Bugs wakes up to find Earth has been conquered by Martians and now must become Marvin’s loyal servant. Ralph Wolf tries on a myriad of disguises to catch sheep.

programme.title: E87 - A. Jake the Brick/Gold Stars/Evergreen/Astral Plane/Ghost Fly
programme.desc: Jake sets out to fulfill a bizarre lifelong ambition.

programme.title: E236 - The Monsters In Your Head/The Feels/Past Aliens Present/Dreamtime/De-Fanged
programme.desc: Ben and Gwen learn a rumor of an alien invasion happening at the park they are camping at, but when they investigate, they discover a preserve containing a host of mutated creatures engineered by Animo!

programme.title: E416 - Drone Rescue/Say Cheese!/Tale Of Two Teddies/Climbing Bean/Proposal Problem
programme.desc: Mr Bean uses Mr Paliwal’s new drone to help find his stolen car.

programme.title: E104 - The Butts/The Traffic
programme.desc: Gumball must help Principal Brown have body confidence about his butt in order to be allowed to do his poem about butts at the Poetry Recital.

programme.title: E1155 - The Overbite/The Cape/Cat's Fancy/Leg Day/Dignity Of Teeth
programme.desc: Raven teaches the other Titans how to dance properly but soon they are captured by the Dance Demon.

programme.title: E89 - B. Is That You?/Everything's Jake/The Visitor/The Cooler/The Mountain
programme.desc: After a memorial for a fallen ally, Jake starts acting very strange.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: House Of Lies
programme.desc: House of Lies is an intense, family-centered drama about two mothers who face off against each other. Shaped by painful pasts, they clash in a fierce battle marked by betrayal, hidden family secrets, and a fight for survival.

programme.title: Master Cutter
programme.desc: Follows a former scout ranger-turned-tailor who discovers his biological daughter is tied to a criminal syndicate.

programme.desc: It features two families who compete to name the most popular answers to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.title: 77 Heartbreaks
programme.desc: When Adam and Eva break up after ten years, Adam thinks the breach was caused by one trivial incident, but Eva knows she's already forgiven Adam 77 times! Sweethearts since law school, Adam changed professions to start a Thai boxing studio and gradually became indifferent to Eva. Seemingly petty matters, like forgetting she hates raisin cookies, become the catalyst for her moving out and changing her Facebook status to 'single'. Despondent, Adam has a drunken tryst with his student, Mandy. Adam gains new insight after accidentally discovering Eva's private journal. Entitled '77 Heartbreaks', the title refers to the philosophy that 'forgiving someone 7 times isn't enough; 70 x 7 times is too much; so go ahead and forgive 77 times!' Reading it makes Adam realize his love. But what can he do to win her back? And what secret is contained in the journal's torn-out last page? He rushes to Eva and melts her heart by recounting their happy memories. When Eva tells him Heartbreak #77

programme.title: All The Long Nights
programme.desc: After a series of mishaps at work caused by her severe pre-menstrual syndrome, Fujisawa lands a new job at an astronomical toy factory, where she meets Yamazoe, a tacit colleague plagued by panic attacks. There the two, whose careers have been derailed by their respective conditions, learn to support and care for each other through life's ups and downs despite their initial friction.

programme.title: UglyDolls
programme.desc: From the filmmakers of Shrek and Alita: Battle Angel comes a new animated musical adventure. In the adorably different town of Uglyville, the free-spirited Moxy and her UglyDolls friends confront what it means to be different, struggle with their desire to be loved, and ultimately discover that you don't have to be perfect to be amazing because who you truly are is what matters most.

programme.title: The Battle at Lake Changjin II
programme.desc: During the second battle of the War to Resist U.S. Aggression and Aid Korea, the 9th Corps Command issues an order for the 7th Infantry Company to attack the Sumun Bridge. The 7th Company suffers a tough march to the Sumun Bridge. The soldiers are near their limits, every step forward in the midst of the harsh weather only means another great challenge to the body and mind...
